roadmap_items: Milestone 5: A2UI Presentation Layer - render terminal action lists with payload-aware disambiguation when labels collide.
Milestone 5: A2UI Presentation Layer - keep contract assertions synchronized with the terminal rendering format.
Milestone 5: A2UI Presentation Layer - keep terminal fallback output aligned with the structured action payloads exposed by the contract.
scope_goal: Make terminal A2UI rendering show payloads for duplicate action labels and keep the contract assertions aligned with that exact output.
tasks_completed: Changed the terminal action renderer so duplicate action labels always include payload previews alongside the action id and any variant suffixes.
Updated the A2UI contract tests to assert the duplicate-label payload lines and the variant-bearing payload presentation.
Rewrote the lane metadata to describe the actual code diff rather than the older metadata-only packet alignment work.
Kept the lane record scoped to terminal rendering and matching tests with no routing or provider impact.
vision_capabilities: Capability 5: Agent-to-UI protocol (A2UI) - terminal rendering now exposes payloads for duplicate action labels as part of the user-facing protocol.
Capability 4: Operator-first control surface - terminal fallback remains the consumer of the structured payloads, now with clearer disambiguation.
